extraction.one_line_summary: COLBRELLI Sonny won the bunch sprint in Erfurt after LUKTSENKO took critical bonus seconds at 2km sprint to neutralize late breakaway threats.
tactical_patterns: LUKTSENKO Alexei aggressively hunted bonus sprints throughout stage to protect SAGAN's GC, showing Bora's willingness to sacrifice sprint train.
Solo breakaways GASPAROTTO and ROBERTS were closed down 10km after escape attempts, suggesting peloton calculated sprint teams controlled gaps ruthlessly.
Final lap bonus sprint at 2km became GC control point rather than stage tactic, revealing teams prioritized overall over stage win.

rider_signals.NIELSEN Magnus Cort: positive: Rode away from breakaway companions on KOM 2 at 115km to go, securing polka dots on countback through selective solo attacking.
rider_signals.COLBRELLI Sonny: positive: Finally converted sprint opportunities after being labeled 'nearly man', suggesting improved positioning or form peak.
rider_signals.LUKTSENKO Alexei: positive: Demonstrated unusual animation and aggression for bonus seconds across multiple sprints, indicating Bora's tactical flexibility beyond leadout duties.
rider_signals.SAGAN Peter: neutral: Required teammate LUKTSENKO to police bonus sprints rather than contesting himself, suggesting conserved energy or positioning concerns.
